description_long: This object is a long, straight-bladed sword with a double-edged design and a pointed tip, suitable for thrusting and slashing. The blade is metallic and features a subtle central ridge running along its length, enhancing its structural integrity. The crossguard is simple and straight, providing hand protection and balance, while the handle is cylindrical with visible segmentations, likely for improved grip. The pommel at the end of the handle is slightly rounded, serving as a counterweight for the blade. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation or decorative elements, suggesting a focus on function over aesthetics. The color scheme is predominantly dark gray, giving the sword a modern, understated appearance.
description: A long, double-edged, straight-bladed sword with a simple crossguard and segmented cylindrical handle, finished in dark gray metal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the width of the crossguard and the pointed tip of the blade.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the straight blade and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blade, crossguard, and handle alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile mirroring view 1, showing the blade's thickness and handle details.
